classification.task_goal: Create a river crossing puzzle involving four fish with clear constraints.
primary_constraints: The boat can carry a maximum of 2 fish at a time
The salmon cannot be left alone in the boat with the goldfish
All 4 fish must cross the river within the next hour
classification.reasoning: The conversation maintained the task of creating a river crossing puzzle with clear constraints throughout. The assistant provided an improved version of the puzzle that included all necessary constraints without any violations.
